/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cloth_sim.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/cloth_sim.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cloth_sim.dir/src/Cloth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cloth_sim.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o -o cloth_sim  libglad.a /usr/lib64/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so -lgcc_s_asneeded -lgcc_s_asneeded
